framework.name: Adyen Merchant-Owned Mandate Model
framework.description: Adyen frames agentic commerce as a control question: who owns the mandate, authorization records, and payment tokens. They advocate merchants retain ownership rather than ceding it to AI platforms (ChatGPT, Gemini). This is an architectural position — mandates and tokens stay merchant-side, not platform-side.
framework.raw_quote: To retain ownership, businesses should maintain merchant-owned mandates, auditable authorization records, and control over payment tokens and lifecycle data.

source.title: Agentic commerce and control: Getting the balance right - Adyen
